nasb.text: They rose up to the heavens, they went down to the depths; Their soul melted away in their misery.

esv.text: They mounted up to heaven; they went down to the depths; their courage melted away in their evil plight;

cnv.text: 他們上到天上，下到深淵， 他們的心因危難而驚慌。

ccb.text: 他们的船只忽而被抛向半空， 忽而落入深渊， 他们吓得面无人色，

csbs.text: 他们上到天空，又下到深渊， 在危急中魂飞魄散。
